game_name: The Great Circus Mystery Starring Mickey & Minnie

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Outfit System
special_mechanics.description: Character can change outfits that provide different special abilities and mechanics

physics_values.magician_outfit: allows magic blasts, underwater breathing, magic carpet control
physics_values.firefighter_uniform: spray water streams, put out fires, push blocks, form icicles
physics_values.mountain_climbing_gear: grappling hook for attachment, hoisting, swinging, item grabbing

special_mechanics.name: Grab and Throw
special_mechanics.description: Standard outfit allows grabbing certain objects and spin-throwing them at enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. No specific physics parameters documented in available sources. Game information limited to gameplay mechanics, story, level design, and outfit system. Movement parameters, gravity, jump physics, and sub-pixel system data not disclosed in public documentation.
sources_used: wikipedia - Disney's Magical Quest series article
